title: triticum dichasians
intro: Triticum dichasians, also known as dichasium or emmer wheat, is an ancient type of wheat that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues, inflammation, and fever. The health benefits of Triticum dichasians include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce oxidative stress and alleviate symptoms of certain diseases. Triticum dichasians can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or decoction to utilize its medicinal properties.
